# Trading Research Offline Fixtures

These fixtures support offline/dry-run validation for MB-P2-005 skills.

- `market_prices_sample.csv` — cross-asset OHLCV sample.
- `portfolio_positions_sample.csv` — position/risk sizing sample.
- `execution_costs_sample.csv` — fee/slippage + liquidity sample.
- `trade_journal_sample.csv` — hypothesis + outcome journal sample.
